parameters.query:
WITH
brain AS (
  SELECT bi.insights
  FROM brain_insights bi
  JOIN clients c ON c.slug = bi.client_id
  WHERE c.id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}'
  ORDER BY bi.week_start DESC LIMIT 1
),
recent_plans AS (
  SELECT theme_name, theme_emoji, theme_direction, week_start
  FROM weekly_plans
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}'
  ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 4
),
avatars AS (
  SELECT a.id, a.style_name, a.motion_preset, p.display_name AS person_name
  FROM avatars a
  JOIN client_avatars ca ON ca.avatar_id = a.id
  LEFT JOIN persons p ON a.person_id = p.id
  WHERE ca.client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}'
    AND a.is_active = true AND a.is_deleted = false
    AND a.approval_status = 'approved' AND a.is_demo = false
  LIMIT 50
),
backgrounds AS (
  SELECT id, label, category
  FROM client_backgrounds
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND active = true
),
music AS (
  SELECT cm.id, cm.song_id, s.name AS song_title, s.genre
  FROM client_music cm
  LEFT JOIN songs s ON cm.song_id = s.id::text
  WHERE cm.client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND cm.active = true
),
templates AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.name, t.asset_type, t.item_count_min, t.item_count_max, t.bg_categories
  FROM templates t
  JOIN client_templates ct ON ct.template_id = t.id
  WHERE ct.client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND ct.is_active = true AND t.is_active = true
),
platforms AS (
  SELECT platform, is_enabled
  FROM client_platforms
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND is_enabled = true
),
inventory_summary AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_seen_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 days') AS aged_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_arrivals,
    MIN(price) AS min_price,
    MAX(price) AS max_price,
    ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price
  FROM inventory_items
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND status = 'active'
),
featured_inventory AS (
  SELECT id, title, price, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - first_seen_at)::int AS days_on_lot, COALESCE(hero_cloudinary_url, hero_image_url) AS thumbnail
  FROM inventory_items
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND status = 'active'
    AND COALESCE(hero_cloudinary_url, hero_image_url) IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY first_seen_at ASC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 20
),
approvers AS (
  SELECT p.id AS person_id, p.email, p.first_name, p.notification_preference
  FROM client_persons cp
  JOIN persons p ON cp.person_id = p.id
  WHERE cp.client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}'
    AND cp.can_approve_plans = true
    AND cp.is_active = true
),
placements AS (
  SELECT code, platform, placement, aspect_ratios, supported_asset_types
  FROM placements
  WHERE is_active = true
  ORDER BY sort_order
),
ad_types AS (
  SELECT asset_type, is_enabled
  FROM client_ad_types
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND is_enabled = true
)
video_recipes AS (
  SELECT id, slug, name, industry FROM video_recipes WHERE is_active = true
)
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(brain)) FROM brain) AS brain,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(recent_plans)) FROM recent_plans) AS recent_plans,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(avatars)) FROM avatars) AS avatars,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(backgrounds)) FROM backgrounds) AS backgrounds,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(music)) FROM music) AS music,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(templates)) FROM templates) AS templates,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(platforms)) FROM platforms) AS platforms,
  (SELECT row_to_json(inventory_summary) FROM inventory_summary) AS inventory_summary,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(featured_inventory)) FROM featured_inventory) AS featured_inventory,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(approvers)) FROM approvers) AS approvers,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(placements)) FROM placements) AS placements_data,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(ad_types)) FROM ad_types) AS ad_types,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(video_recipes)) FROM video_recipes) AS video_recipes

DELETE FROM assets WHERE plan_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.plan_id }}'::uuid;

UPDATE weekly_plans SET
  status = 'draft',
  theme_name = '{{ ($json._plan.theme.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  theme_emoji = '{{ ($json._plan.theme.emoji || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  theme_seed = '{{ ($json._plan.theme.theme_seed || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  theme_direction = '{{ ($json._plan.theme.direction || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  theme_ad_message = '{{ $json._plan.theme.ad_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  theme_edu_message = '{{ $json._plan.theme.edu_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  inventory_description = '{{ ($json._plan.inventory_description || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  experiment_name = '{{ ($json._plan.experiment.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  experiment_goal = '{{ ($json._plan.experiment.goal || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  experiment_approach = '{{ ($json._plan.experiment.approach || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  total_paid_ads = {{ $json._plan.assets.filter(a => a.asset_type === 'paid').length }},
  total_organic = {{ $json._plan.assets.filter(a => a.asset_type === 'organic').length }},
  always_on_status = '{{ ($json._plan.always_on && $json._plan.always_on.status) || "active" }}',
  always_on_copy_refresh = {{ $json._plan.always_on && $json._plan.always_on.copy_refresh ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  always_on_copy_direction = {{ $json._plan.always_on && $json._plan.always_on.copy_direction ? "'" + ($json._plan.always_on.copy_direction || "").replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.plan_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id, client_id, week_start

INSERT INTO assets (
  id, plan_id, asset_type, template_id, template_name, title,
  avatars, music_id, music_name, background_id, background_name,
  target_length, inventory_items, planned_outputs,
  included, sort_order, target_placements,
  ad_copy, boost_content_id, boost_metrics,
  budget_percentage,
  organic_content_type, organic_platform, organic_day_of_week, organic_brief,
  video_recipe_id,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.plan_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.asset_type }}',
  {{ $json.template_id ? "'" + $json.template_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.template_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.title ? "'" + $json.title + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.avatars }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.music_id ? "'" + $json.music_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.music_name ? "'" + $json.music_name + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.background_id ? "'" + $json.background_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.background_name ? "'" + $json.background_name + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.target_length }}',
  '{{ $json.inventory_items }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.planned_outputs }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.included }},
  {{ $json.sort_order }},
  '{{ $json.target_placements }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.ad_copy ? "'" + $json.ad_copy + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.boost_content_id ? "'" + $json.boost_content_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.boost_metrics ? "'" + $json.boost_metrics + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.budget_percentage != null ? $json.budget_percentage : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.organic_content_type ? "'" + $json.organic_content_type + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.organic_platform ? "'" + $json.organic_platform + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.organic_day_of_week ? "'" + $json.organic_day_of_week + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.organic_brief ? "'" + $json.organic_brief + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.video_recipe_id ? "'" + $json.video_recipe_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW(), NOW()
)
RETURNING id

SELECT wp.id AS plan_id, wp.client_id::text, wp.theme_name, wp.theme_emoji, 
       wp.theme_direction, wp.theme_seed, wp.inventory_target, wp.inventory_description,
       wp.idea_ping_summary, wp.status, wp.week_start::text, wp.week_end::text,
       wp.weekly_budget, wp.approved_by,
       c.slug, c.name AS client_name, c.industry
FROM weekly_plans wp
JOIN clients c ON wp.client_id = c.id
WHERE wp.id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid

WITH
brain AS (
  SELECT bi.insights

),

),
platforms AS (

),
inventory_summary AS (

    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_arrivals,

featured_inventory AS (

  FROM inventory_items
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}' AND status = 'active'
    AND COALESCE(hero_cloudinary_url, hero_image_url) IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY first_seen_at ASC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 20
),
approvers AS (
  SELECT p.id AS person_id, p.email, p.first_name, p.notification_preference
  FROM client_persons cp
  JOIN persons p ON cp.person_id = p.id
  WHERE cp.client_id = '{{ $('Fetch Plan').first().json.client_id }}'

),
ad_types AS (

video_recipes AS (

  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(platforms)) FROM platforms) AS platforms,

  '{{ ($json.template_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

SELECT wp.id AS plan_id, wp.client_id::text, wp.theme_name, wp.theme_emoji, 
       wp.theme_direction, wp.theme_seed, wp.inventory_target, wp.inventory_description,
       wp.idea_ping_summary, wp.status, wp.week_start::text, wp.week_end::text,
       wp.weekly_budget, wp.approved_by,
       c.slug, c.name AS client_name, c.industry
FROM weekly_plans wp
JOIN clients c ON wp.client_id = c.id
WHERE wp.id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid
